ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-21-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-28-2021 Continued To Jul-21-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Simon, via ZOOM, counsel for Demetrice Jones, Administrator.

At the outset, the court questions counsel as to the Status of close of the Estate. Counsel advises that there have been several issues caused by COVID-19 including squatters and attempting to evict the current tenants who have not paid rent which may lead to possible foreclosure of the home. Counsel requests a continuance to address these matters and hopefully file a final Inventory and Appraisal and Petition for Final Distribution or Report of Status.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to July 21, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Tauscher. Not reported.
